// ==== C/ValueObjects/Code.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace C;

public sealed partial class Code : ValueObject
{
    public string Raw { get; }
    public string Label { get; }

    public Code(string raw, string label)
    {
        if (!RawRegex0().IsMatch(raw))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Code),
                rule: "must start with an uppercase letter");
        }

        if (!RawRegex1().IsMatch(raw))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Code),
                rule: "must end with a digit");
        }

        if (!LabelRegex2().IsMatch(label))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Code),
                rule: "label must be lowercase letters");
        }

        Raw = raw;
        Label = label;
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Code {{ Raw = {Raw}, Label = {Label} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Raw;
        yield return Label;
    }

    [GeneratedRegex(@"^[A-Z]", RegexOptions.None, matchTimeoutMilliseconds: 1000)]
    private static partial Regex RawRegex0();

    [GeneratedRegex(@"[0-9]$", RegexOptions.None, matchTimeoutMilliseconds: 1000)]
    private static partial Regex RawRegex1();

    [GeneratedRegex(@"^[a-z]+$", RegexOptions.None, matchTimeoutMilliseconds: 1000)]
    private static partial Regex LabelRegex2();
}

// ==== C/ValueObjects/Email.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace C;

public sealed partial class Email : ValueObject
{
    public string Raw { get; }

    public Email(string raw)
    {
        if (!RawRegex0().IsMatch(raw))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Email),
                rule: "invalid email address");
        }

        Raw = raw;
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Email {{ Raw = {Raw} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Raw;
    }

    [GeneratedRegex(@"^[^@]+@[^@]+$", RegexOptions.None, matchTimeoutMilliseconds: 1000)]
    private static partial Regex RawRegex0();
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/DomainInvariantViolationException.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Thrown when a domain invariant or illegal state transition is violated.</summary>
public sealed class DomainInvariantViolationException : Exception
{
    public string TypeName { get; }
    public string Rule { get; }

    public DomainInvariantViolationException(string type, string rule)
        : base($"Invariant violated on {type}: {rule}") { TypeName = type; Rule = rule; }
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/IAggregateRoot.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Marks an entity as the consistency boundary (root) of an aggregate.</summary>
public interface IAggregateRoot { }

// ==== Koine/Runtime/ValueObject.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Base class for value objects: equality by component value, not reference.</summary>
public abstract class ValueObject
{
    /// <summary>The values that define this value object's identity, in order.</summary>
    protected abstract IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents();

    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
    {
        if (obj is null || obj.GetType() != GetType())
        {
            return false;
        }
        return GetEqualityComponents().SequenceEqual(((ValueObject)obj).GetEqualityComponents());
    }

    public override int GetHashCode()
    {
        var hash = new HashCode();
        foreach (var component in GetEqualityComponents())
            hash.Add(component);
        return hash.ToHashCode();
    }

    public static bool operator ==(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);

    public static bool operator !=(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => !(left == right);

    /// <summary>Wraps an ordered collection (list) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Ordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: true);

    /// <summary>Wraps an unordered collection (set/map) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Unordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: false);

    private sealed class SequenceComponent
    {
        private readonly List<object?> _items = new();
        private readonly bool _ordered;

        public SequenceComponent(System.Collections.IEnumerable items, bool ordered)
        {
            _ordered = ordered;
            foreach (var item in items) _items.Add(item);
        }

        public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        {
            if (obj is not SequenceComponent other || _items.Count != other._items.Count)
            {
                return false;
            }
            return _ordered
                ? _items.SequenceEqual(other._items)
                : _items.All(x => _items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)) == other._items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)));
        }

        public override int GetHashCode()
        {
            if (_ordered)
            {
                var hash = new HashCode();
                foreach (var item in _items) hash.Add(item);
                return hash.ToHashCode();
            }
            var acc = 0;
            foreach (var item in _items) acc ^= item?.GetHashCode() ?? 0;
            return acc;
        }
    }
}
